metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.description: Detects phishing emails with malicious attachments targeting retail staff. Queries RetailShield_Logs_CL for Email_Event records with high PhishingScore_d or SuspicionScore_d, sourced from the RetailShield log generator. Aligned with MITRE T1566.001 — Spearphishing Attachment.
